race_name: UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya

top_categories.workout_context: 60 miles on flat burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya's flat forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 60 miles.
Race-pace efforts that mimic UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before November.
When someone attacks on flat, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
Base fitness for UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya's flat rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
2-minute all-out efforts on flat. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya. Train it until it feels boring.
The aerobic base that lets you ride flat at tempo for 60 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
At UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya's flat actually does to you.

race_overlay.heat: November in Antalya, Turkey — Mild Mediterranean November weather (13-22°C), windy conditions possible, spring-like with coastal influence. Begin heat acclimatization 10–14 days before UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya — 20–30min sauna sessions or midday rides in full kit. Pre-load sodium 48 hours out. Target 500–750ml/hr with electrolytes on race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya’s 60 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at UCI Gran Fondo World Series Antalya requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on flat to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, Gravel Specific, and Race Simulation to prepare you for 60 miles of flat in Antalya, Turkey.
